This skill guides creation of distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic aesthetics.

## Design Thinking

Before coding:
- Define purpose and audience
- Commit to a strong visual direction
- Respect performance and accessibility constraints
- Ensure one memorable, differentiating visual idea

## Frontend Aesthetics Guidelines

Focus on:
- Typography with clear hierarchy
- Cohesive color system and theme consistency
- Purposeful motion and micro-interactions
- Spatial rhythm, composition, and readability
- Atmosphere via gradients, overlays, depth, and polish

## Guardrails

- Avoid generic cookie-cutter patterns
- Keep design choices intentional and consistent
- Match implementation complexity to the aesthetic vision
- Prioritize production-grade, functional code
